channel.title: Mobile-Game on Sudeep's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Mobile-Game on Sudeep's Blog

item.title: How to find the game art for your Game Project
item.description: I am currently working on a game development, i do programming and in the game if i require graphics then i hire designer. I was curious about how other indie developers like me manage the game assets. I asked in a Facebook group about this topic. Hopefully i got reply from Dozens of people. In this post i will share how they manage the game assets being a Game Programmer.

item.title: Jhandi Munda (Langur Burja) - Mobile Game
item.description: Jhandi Munda is a gambling game played mostly in South Asian countries including Nepal, India, Bangladesh and Myanmar. It is also known with a different name in different regions such as “Langur Burja”, “Jhanda Burja” and “Khor Khore” or “Khod khode”. I have developed a Mobile game based on this. Jhandi Munda is mostly played during Hindu’s big festivals like Dussehra(Dashain) and Deepawali(Tihar). We have 6 dices with 6 faces in each die.
